title: Ubiquiti UniFi U7-Pro-5 - Tri-Band Wi-Fi 7 Access Point, 5-pack
description: Powerful Ubiquiti U7 Pro access point in a pack of five units. It connects to the network via a standard LAN port with speeds of up to 2.5 Gb/s . Wireless frequencies include 2.4 GHz at 688 Mb/s , 5 GHz at 2880 Mb/s , and the 6 GHz band at 5760 Mb/s . The access point is powered via PoE+ protocol, with a maximum power consumption of 21 W . It provides internet connectivity for more than 300 devices simultaneously High speed of up to 5760 Mb/s on the 6 GHz band Powered via PoE+ Supports connectivity for over 300 devices at the same time (5) Devices Wall/ceiling mounting kit
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz (triple band) WiFi standards 802.11ax, 802.11be, 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 5760 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 23 Security WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2/WPA3) 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 6GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 6 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 6, 4, 5,8 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 21 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 680 Width [mm] 206 Height [mm] 46 Depth [mm] 206
